title.en: LRP Reference Shelf: MIB Modules (Clause 13) and the Four Annexes
title.zh: LRP 参考书架：MIB 模块（第 13 章）与四个附录

blocks.en: We have learned how the Link-local Registration Protocol (LRP) — the IEEE 802.1CS mechanism that lets two neighbors on a single link register and exchange a database of records — actually behaves on the wire. This final lesson is the reference shelf: how an LRP device is managed remotely (Clause 13, the MIB modules), how a vendor proves conformance (Annex A), what a real LRP application must still define (Annex B), the exact bytes LRP rides inside LLDP (Annex C), and where to read further (Annex D). Think of it as the back matter of the standard — the parts you reach for when implementing, not when first learning the idea.
blocks.zh: 我们已经学过链路本地注册协议（LRP，Link-local Registration Protocol）——这是 IEEE 802.1CS 定义的机制，让一条链路上的两个相邻设备注册并交换一份记录数据库——在线路上的实际行为。本节课是参考书架：LRP 设备如何被远程管理（第 13 章，MIB 模块）、厂商如何证明一致性（附录 A）、真实的 LRP 应用还必须定义什么（附录 B）、LRP 在 LLDP 内承载的确切字节（附录 C），以及进一步阅读的去处（附录 D）。可以把它看作标准的后记部分——实现时才会翻阅，而非初学概念时所需。

blocks.en: Clause 13.1 anchors everything in the Internet-standard management framework. A MIB (Management Information Base) is a virtual store of managed objects — counters, status values, configuration knobs — that a manager reads and writes, usually over SNMP (Simple Network Management Protocol). Each object is described in a formal data-definition language called SMIv2 (Structure of Management Information, version 2). 802.1CS supplies a complete SMIv2 MIB set covering every feature of the standard; the formal grounding is IETF STD 58 (RFCs 2578, 2579, 2580). So 'the MIB' is simply the machine-readable contract for managing an LRP box.
blocks.zh: 第 13.1 节把一切锚定在互联网标准管理框架之上。MIB（管理信息库，Management Information Base）是被管理对象的虚拟存储——计数器、状态值、配置旋钮——管理者通常通过 SNMP（简单网络管理协议，Simple Network Management Protocol）读写它们。每个对象都用一种叫 SMIv2（管理信息结构第 2 版，Structure of Management Information version 2）的形式化数据定义语言描述。802.1CS 提供了覆盖标准每项功能的完整 SMIv2 MIB 集合；其形式化依据是 IETF STD 58（RFC 2578、2579、2580）。所以“MIB”不过是管理一台 LRP 设备的机器可读契约。

blocks.en: Clause 13.2 lays out the structure: the LRP MIB is split into three modules. The LRP-TC-MIB (13.2.1) defines only textual conventions — reusable named data types like LrpHelloStatus, LrpAppId, and LrpInetAddressInfo — so other modules import them rather than redefining them. The LRP-MIB (13.2.2) holds the actual operational objects in a single group, lrpDsDtGroup, with tables describing each LRP-DT (Data Transport) instance, each Portal state machine, and their counters. The LLDP-V2-LRP-EXT-MIB (13.2.3) extends the LLDP (Link Layer Discovery Protocol) MIB with three groups so a manager can control and observe the LRP discovery TLVs LLDP carries.
blocks.zh: 第 13.2 节给出结构：LRP MIB 被拆成三个模块。LRP-TC-MIB（13.2.1）只定义文本约定——可复用的具名数据类型，如 LrpHelloStatus、LrpAppId、LrpInetAddressInfo——其他模块导入它们而无需重新定义。LRP-MIB（13.2.2）在单一分组 lrpDsDtGroup 中存放实际的运行对象，其表格描述每个 LRP-DT（数据传输，Data Transport）实例、每个 Portal 状态机及其计数器。LLDP-V2-LRP-EXT-MIB（13.2.3）用三个分组扩展 LLDP（链路层发现协议，Link Layer Discovery Protocol）的 MIB，使管理者能控制和观测 LLDP 所承载的 LRP 发现 TLV。

caption.en: Clause 13.2: three MIB modules. Types flow into objects; an SNMP manager reads/writes the operational and TLV-control objects.
caption.zh: 第 13.2 节：三个 MIB 模块。类型流入对象；SNMP 管理者读写运行对象与 TLV 控制对象。

blocks.en: Clause 13.3 notes a small but important dependency: because the LRP discovery information rides inside LLDP, both the LRP-MIB and the LLDP-V2-LRP-EXT-MIB import textual conventions from the LLDP-V2-TC-MIB defined in IEEE Std 802.1AB. In other words, LRP does not reinvent address or type definitions that LLDP already standardized — it reuses them, keeping the two MIBs consistent.
blocks.zh: 第 13.3 节指出一个不大但重要的依赖：由于 LRP 发现信息承载在 LLDP 内部，LRP-MIB 与 LLDP-V2-LRP-EXT-MIB 都从 IEEE Std 802.1AB 定义的 LLDP-V2-TC-MIB 导入文本约定。换言之，LRP 不重新发明 LLDP 已经标准化的地址或类型定义——而是复用它们，使两个 MIB 保持一致。

blocks.en: Security rule of thumb (Clause 13.4): treat any MIB as a remote control panel. SNMP before version 3 has no real security, so the standard recommends SNMPv3 with cryptographic authentication and privacy — and even then, the operator must restrict who may GET or SET each object.
blocks.zh: 安全经验法则（第 13.4 节）：把任何 MIB 都当成一个远程控制面板。SNMPv3 之前的版本没有真正的安全性，因此标准建议使用启用了加密认证与隐私保护的 SNMPv3——即便如此，运营者仍须限制谁可以 GET 或 SET 每个对象。

blocks.en: The three security subclauses split by module. 13.4.1 covers the LRP-TC-MIB and is short: it defines no managed objects at all — only data types — so it carries no meaningful security risk on its own. 13.4.2 covers the LRP-MIB: it has no read-write objects, but some read-only objects may still be sensitive, so access (including GET and NOTIFY) should be controlled and possibly encrypted. 13.4.3 covers the LLDP-V2-LRP-EXT-MIB, the riskiest of the three because it does expose read-write objects (such as the advertised TCP port number and IPv4/IPv6 enable/address knobs). Misconfiguring them — accidentally or maliciously — can advertise a wrong address, steer an LRP-DT connection to the wrong Proxy system, or wrongly enable/disable the discovery TLVs.
blocks.zh: 三个安全小节按模块划分。13.4.1 针对 LRP-TC-MIB，篇幅很短：它根本不定义任何被管理对象——只定义数据类型——因此本身不带来实质安全风险。13.4.2 针对 LRP-MIB：它没有读写对象，但某些只读对象仍可能敏感，故应控制访问（包括 GET 与 NOTIFY），必要时加密。13.4.3 针对 LLDP-V2-LRP-EXT-MIB，是三者中风险最高的，因为它确实暴露了读写对象（如所通告的 TCP 端口号、IPv4/IPv6 的启用/地址旋钮）。错误配置它们——无论无意还是恶意——都可能通告错误地址、把 LRP-DT 连接引向错误的 Proxy 系统，或错误地启用/禁用发现 TLV。

blocks.en: Clause 13.5 is the payload of the chapter: the actual MIB source, in three subclauses matching the three modules. 13.5.1 is the LRP-TC-MIB text — its MODULE-IDENTITY, the IEEE 802.1 Working Group contact block, and TEXTUAL-CONVENTION definitions like LrpHelloStatus. 13.5.2 is the full LRP-MIB. 13.5.3 is the LLDPv2 LRP extension MIB. These are the canonical, copy-paste-able definitions an implementer compiles; the standard even grants a copyright release so the MIBs can be freely reproduced for their intended purpose.
blocks.zh: 第 13.5 节是本章的实质内容：真正的 MIB 源码，分为对应三个模块的三个小节。13.5.1 是 LRP-TC-MIB 文本——它的 MODULE-IDENTITY、IEEE 802.1 工作组联系信息块，以及像 LrpHelloStatus 这样的 TEXTUAL-CONVENTION 定义。13.5.2 是完整的 LRP-MIB。13.5.3 是 LLDPv2 LRP 扩展 MIB。这些是实现者编译时所用的权威、可复制粘贴的定义；标准甚至授予版权豁免，使这些 MIB 可为其预期目的自由复制。

blocks.en: The annexes finish the standard. Annex A (normative) is the PICS (Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement) proforma — a fixed-format questionnaire a supplier completes to declare which capabilities and options were implemented. Each row has an item reference, the question, the clause it points to, a status (M = mandatory, O = optional, X = not applicable, with conditional symbols like 'CM1:M'), and a support checkbox. It is grouped by system role: common capabilities, then Native end system, Native relay system, Proxy system, and Controlled system. A completed proforma is the device's official conformance claim and a checklist that guards against oversight.
blocks.zh: 附录收尾整部标准。附录 A（规范性）是 PICS（协议实现一致性声明，Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement）表——供应商填写的固定格式问卷，用以声明实现了哪些能力与选项。每一行包含项目编号、问题、所指向的条款、状态（M=强制，O=可选，X=不适用，并有形如“CM1:M”的条件符号），以及一个支持勾选框。它按系统角色分组：通用能力，随后是原生终端系统、原生中继系统、Proxy 系统、受控系统。填好的表格即设备的正式一致性声明，也是防止疏漏的检查清单。

blocks.en: Annex B (informative) is a reality check: LRP alone is nearly useless — it needs an LRP application, and this standard specifies none. The annex lists what any real application must define: which LLDP instance to use per port, whether the ECP and/or TCP transport (6.9.1/6.9.2) is allowed and with which IP address, the syntax of any application data in the Hello LRPDU, the syntax of the Record LRPDUs, and how data propagates between Portals. It also contrasts LRP-DS (the Database Subset model) with IS-IS routing, warns that records are strictly link-local (so naive global propagation can fail when links have different maximum record sizes), discusses database-locking pitfalls, Hello-time selection, TCP active/passive OPEN preferences (to cope with NAT, Network Address Translation), and acknowledgment patterns. Being informative, none of it is mandatory — it is design guidance.
blocks.zh: 附录 B（资料性）是一记现实提醒：单凭 LRP 几乎无用——它需要一个 LRP 应用，而本标准并未规定任何应用。该附录列出任何真实应用必须定义的内容：每个端口使用哪个 LLDP 实例、是否允许 ECP 与/或 TCP 传输（6.9.1/6.9.2）及使用何种 IP 地址、Hello LRPDU 中应用数据的语法、Record LRPDU 的语法，以及数据如何在 Portal 之间传播。它还把 LRP-DS（数据库子集模型，Database Subset）与 IS-IS 路由作对比，警告记录严格为链路本地（因此当各链路最大记录尺寸不同时，天真的全局传播会失败），讨论数据库锁定的陷阱、Hello 时间的选取、TCP 主动/被动 OPEN 偏好（以应对 NAT，网络地址转换），以及确认模式。作为资料性内容，这些都非强制——属于设计指引。

blocks.en: Annex C (normative) defines the exact bytes that let neighbors find each other. It specifies two IEEE 802.1 Organizationally Specific TLVs (Type-Length-Value structures) carried inside LLDPDUs — not inside LRPDUs. The LRP ECP Discovery TLV (C.2.1) establishes ECP (Edge Control Protocol) associations among Portals on a link; the LRP TCP Discovery TLV (C.2.2) establishes TCP associations. Both set the TLV type field to 127 (the Organizationally Specific value) and use OUI 00-80-C2 (the IEEE 802.1 Organizationally Unique Identifier). Each carries an Application count and a list of Application descriptors (a four-octet AppId = three-octet OUI/CID plus one octet identifying the application). The TCP TLV additionally carries a TCP port number and an Address info field whose low nibble selects noAddress / addrIPv4 / addrIPv6 and whose high nibble expresses active/passive OPEN preference. Usage rules forbid repeating the same AppId in two descriptors of one TLV and require at least one IP address per TCP TLV.
blocks.zh: 附录 C（规范性）定义了让相邻设备彼此发现的确切字节。它规定了两个承载在 LLDPDU 内（而非 LRPDU 内）的 IEEE 802.1 组织专用 TLV（类型-长度-值结构，Type-Length-Value）。LRP ECP 发现 TLV（C.2.1）在链路上的各 Portal 间建立 ECP（边缘控制协议，Edge Control Protocol）关联；LRP TCP 发现 TLV（C.2.2）建立 TCP 关联。两者都把 TLV 类型字段设为 127（组织专用值），并使用 OUI 00-80-C2（IEEE 802.1 的组织唯一标识符，Organizationally Unique Identifier）。每个 TLV 携带一个应用计数和一串应用描述符（四字节的 AppId = 三字节 OUI/CID 加一字节标识应用）。TCP TLV 还额外携带一个 TCP 端口号和一个 Address info 字段，其低 4 位选择 noAddress / addrIPv4 / addrIPv6，高 4 位表达主动/被动 OPEN 偏好。使用规则禁止在一个 TLV 的两个描述符中重复同一 AppId，并要求每个 TCP TLV 至少包含一个 IP 地址。

blocks.en: Normative vs informative is the key to reading annexes: Annex A and Annex C are normative — you must follow them to conform. Annex B and Annex D are informative — helpful context you are free to ignore. Annex D (the Bibliography) lists non-binding references such as Fletcher's checksum paper, IEEE 802.1AB/AC/AE/Qcc, and IETF RFCs (e.g., RFC 8446 TLS 1.3, ISO/IEC 10589 IS-IS).
blocks.zh: 区分规范性与资料性是阅读附录的关键：附录 A 与附录 C 是规范性的——必须遵循才能合规。附录 B 与附录 D 是资料性的——是可自由忽略的有益背景。附录 D（参考文献）列出不具约束力的引用，如 Fletcher 的校验和论文、IEEE 802.1AB/AC/AE/Qcc，以及 IETF RFC（例如 RFC 8446 的 TLS 1.3、ISO/IEC 10589 的 IS-IS）。

summary.en: Coverage map: every clause in this lesson with its exact number and page
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：本课每个条款的确切编号与页码

blocks.en: Clause 13 (p.93–97 intro, plus MIB source): 13.1 Internet standard management framework — SMIv2 MIB set, SNMP access, grounded in RFC 3410 §7 and STD 58 (p.93). 13.2 Structure of the LRP MIB — three modules in Table 13-1: 13.2.1 LRP-TC-MIB (textual conventions LrpHelloStatus/LrpAppId/LrpInetAddressInfo), 13.2.2 LRP-MIB (single lrpDsDtGroup with DT-instance, Portal, and counter tables), 13.2.3 LLDP-V2-LRP-EXT-MIB (three groups for ECP/TCP discovery TLV control) (p.93–94). 13.3 Relationship to the LLDP-V2-TC-MIB — imports textual conventions from IEEE Std 802.1AB (p.94). 13.4 Security considerations and its three parts: 13.4.1 LRP-TC-MIB (no managed objects, no real risk), 13.4.2 LRP-MIB (no read-write objects, but sensitive read-only objects), 13.4.3 LLDP-V2-LRP-EXT-MIB (seven read-write objects listed; misconfiguration can mis-advertise addresses or mis-enable TLVs) (p.94–96). 13.5 MIB modules: 13.5.1 LRP-TC-MIB source (MODULE-IDENTITY, TEXTUAL-CONVENTIONs), 13.5.2 LRP-MIB, 13.5.3 LLDPv2 LRP extension MIB; copyright release granted (p.97). Annex A (normative) PICS proforma — fixed-format conformance questionnaire grouped by role NE/NR/PS/CS with M/O/X statuses and conditional items (p.131–138). Annex B (informative) LRP application specifications — what an application must define, LRP-DS vs IS-IS, link-local record limits, locking, Hello time, NAT/TCP OPEN, ack patterns (p.139–143). Annex C (normative) IEEE 802.1 Organizationally Specific TLVs — LRP ECP Discovery TLV (C.2.1) and LRP TCP Discovery TLV (C.2.2), type=127, OUI 00-80-C2, Application descriptors, Address info nibbles, usage rules (p.144–148). Annex D (informative) Bibliography — non-binding references B1–B21+ (p.149–150).
blocks.zh: 第 13 章（第 93–97 页导言，外加 MIB 源码）：13.1 互联网标准管理框架——SMIv2 MIB 集合、SNMP 访问，依据 RFC 3410 §7 与 STD 58（第 93 页）。13.2 LRP MIB 的结构——表 13-1 中的三个模块：13.2.1 LRP-TC-MIB（文本约定 LrpHelloStatus/LrpAppId/LrpInetAddressInfo）、13.2.2 LRP-MIB（单一 lrpDsDtGroup，含 DT 实例、Portal 与计数器表）、13.2.3 LLDP-V2-LRP-EXT-MIB（三个分组用于 ECP/TCP 发现 TLV 控制）（第 93–94 页）。13.3 与 LLDP-V2-TC-MIB 的关系——从 IEEE Std 802.1AB 导入文本约定（第 94 页）。13.4 安全考量及其三部分：13.4.1 LRP-TC-MIB（无被管理对象，无实质风险）、13.4.2 LRP-MIB（无读写对象，但有敏感只读对象）、13.4.3 LLDP-V2-LRP-EXT-MIB（列出七个读写对象；错误配置可能误通告地址或误启用 TLV）（第 94–96 页）。13.5 MIB 模块：13.5.1 LRP-TC-MIB 源码（MODULE-IDENTITY、TEXTUAL-CONVENTION）、13.5.2 LRP-MIB、13.5.3 LLDPv2 LRP 扩展 MIB；并授予版权豁免（第 97 页）。附录 A（规范性）PICS 表——按角色 NE/NR/PS/CS 分组的固定格式一致性问卷，含 M/O/X 状态与条件项（第 131–138 页）。附录 B（资料性）LRP 应用规范——应用必须定义的内容、LRP-DS 与 IS-IS、链路本地记录限制、锁定、Hello 时间、NAT/TCP OPEN、确认模式（第 139–143 页）。附录 C（规范性）IEEE 802.1 组织专用 TLV——LRP ECP 发现 TLV（C.2.1）与 LRP TCP 发现 TLV（C.2.2）、type=127、OUI 00-80-C2、应用描述符、Address info 的高低半字节、使用规则（第 144–148 页）。附录 D（资料性）参考文献——不具约束力的引用 B1–B21 等（第 149–150 页）。

cites.note: Clause 13: management framework, MIB structure (three modules), LLDP-V2-TC-MIB relationship, security considerations 13.4.1-13.4.3, and MIB module source 13.5.1-13.5.3.
Annex A (normative) PICS proforma: instructions, conditional items, and role-grouped capability tables.
Annex B (informative): LRP application specification responsibilities, LRP-DS vs IS-IS, locking, Hello time, NAT/TCP OPEN.
Annex C (normative): LRP ECP and TCP Discovery TLVs, type 127, OUI 00-80-C2, Application descriptors, Address info, usage rules.
Annex D (informative): Bibliography of non-binding references.
